# Codex Rate Monitor v0.1.3

## What's Changed

- Support the latest ChatGPT desktop app that hosts Codex under `ChatGPT.exe` while keeping compatibility with the legacy `Codex.exe` desktop app.
- Move the lower overlay from the retired bottom-left profile area to the bottom-right corner while preserving the top position and automatically migrating existing settings.
- Fall back to enumerating visible desktop-app windows when the packaged ChatGPT process does not expose `MainWindowHandle`.
- Resolve Codex app-server startup from multiple local install shapes: ChatGPT bundled `resources\codex.exe`, npm/native Codex CLI, `codex.cmd`, and `codex.ps1`.
- Improve rate-limit response parsing for newer app-server payloads and include the required empty `params` object when reading rate limits.
- Show a clearer status when the local Codex app-server is using API key auth and cannot read ChatGPT account 5-hour / 7-day usage windows.
- Move Appearance settings to the first tray menu item.
- Update English, Simplified Chinese, and Traditional Chinese README usage guidance and troubleshooting for ChatGPT desktop, Codex CLI environment checks, and API-key limitations.
